series_description: Applications
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: Copies of entrolled bill signed into law.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 2 years

series_description: Election expenses charged back.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years & until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released;

series_title: Resolutions Except for Bond Issues that Pass
series_description: Copies of resolutions by governmental bodies authorizing placement of issues on the ballot
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until 5 years after election

series_description: Office copy of voucher sent to county auditor
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released;

series_title: Change of Name, Deaths, & Disenfranchised Voter Reports
series_description: Original reports issued by Probate Court, Clerk of Courts & Health Dept.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until 2 years after filing;

series_description: Report of the State Examiner
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 copy permanently

series_title: Resolutions on Bond Issues that Pass
series_description: Copies of resolutions by governmental bodies authorizing placement of issues on the ballot
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for the life of the bond

series_description: Out of State Motor vehicle summons in civil action cases.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 1 year prior to transfer to state record center for 2 additional years prior to

series_description: Original PAC campaign finance reports.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office six years

series_description: Record of absentee voters
retention_statement: Paper: Permanent, or can be destroyed if available in electronic form ; Electronic: Permanent

series_description: General Office Correspondence
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year

series_description: Copy of annexation ordinances, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain permanently

series_description: Office copy of financial receipts issued.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released;

series_title: Minutes of the Board of Elections
series_description: Record of proceedings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain permanentl

series_description: Required to be filed under
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Campaign financial history for candidates.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 years

series_description: Master & precinct card files for currently registered voters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain permanently

series_description: Record of bond issues & tax levies in the form of sample ballots.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper copies eight (8) years in office ; Electronic: Retain electronic copies eight (8) years

series_description: Cancelled voter registration cards.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently ; Paper: Retain permanently, unless scanned and scans kept permanently

series_description: Record of fees collected.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 10 years and until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released;

series_description: Candidates' expense reports filed.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 years

series_description: Campaign financial history: for/against questions and issues.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Notices of withdrawal received.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until 1 year after election

series_description: Office receipt book for ethics material & campaign financing statements issued.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: Official record of votes by precinct for all races and issues required to be reported to the Secretary of State's office by the Boards of Election from each county in Ohio.
retention_statement: Paper: Four years in office

series_description: Minutes of meetings, transcripts of hearings and various other proceedings, books containing names of commissioners and general correspondence.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for 2 (two) years

series_description: Record of absentee voters
retention_statement: Paper: Permanent, or can be destroyed if available in electronic form ; Electronic: Permanent

series_description: Abstracts of returns by county.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years on site filmed transfer to State Archives.

series_description: Political sub-division precinct boundaries.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain permanently

series_description: State report of unofficial results.
retention_statement: Paper: Hold 1 year and destroy

series_description: Governor's proclamations
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Abstract of votes cast in all elections
retention_statement: Paper: Retain permanently

series_description: Copies of unsuccessful bids.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 years after contract awarded

series_description: Board's financial record
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 years and until all items are cleared & audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released;

series_description: This record series consist of U.C.C. filings completed, imaged and/or microfilmed.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper records are imaged or microfilmed at imaging center, checked for completeness and sent to off-site records storage for 5 years ; Microform: Retain Permanetly ; Electronic: Retain Permanently
disposition: Paper: Wastepaper ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent

series_description: This record series consists of the original microfilm & microfiched records of the U.C.C.& Corporation filings.
retention_statement: Microform: Retain Permanently

series_description: This record series consists of Corporation filings, completed, imaged and/or microfilmed. Corporation filings is a collection of files that records business filings submitted to, and approved by the Ohio Secretary of State. These filings are recorded and maintained in accordance with the Ohio Revised Code 1746.04.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain Permanently. ; Microform: Retain Permanently. ; Paper: Paper records are imaged or microfilmed at imaging center, checked for completeness and sent to off-site records storage for 5 years
disposition: Electronic: Permanent ; Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper

series_description: Correspondence relating to the issuance of Notary Public and Police Commissions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years

series_description: Contains name of each person appointed by the SOS, date of appt., date of beginning & expiration of term and the business firm which he/she represents. Also applies to individuals appt., to serve as O.D.N.R. park area officers. (Note: Not required to be kept under O.R.C. 107.10) Maintained as an electronic file.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain Permanently.

series_description: Per O.R.C. 147.051. Contains name, mailing address, date of commission, expiration date of commission, verification of the authority and good standing of the individual to perform acts; whether the notary is registered to perform online notarizations and a description of any administrative or disciplinary action taken against the notary. Maintained as an electronic file.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain Permanently

series_description: Application for commission as Special Police Officer certifying the applicant''s qualifications as described in O.R.C. 4973.17. A permanent record of special police officer and their terms of office is maintained in a Record of Speical Police Officers (D300-03). The term of office of a special police officer is three (3) years. Maintained as electronic file.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for four (4) years

series_description: Electronic record of applications received, processed and the commissions issued daily.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently.

series_description: Record of fees receved for Notary Public & Police Commissions submited to CAS.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years

series_description: Payroll Warrant Cancellation Advice and Transmittal
retention_statement: Paper: Retain (4) four years

series_description: All Ballots : Used and Unused.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for eighty-one (81) days after an election or 22 months after a federal election ; Electronic: Retain for eighty-one (81) days after an election or 22 months after a federal election

series_description: Record of voters'' transfer of registration from one area to another.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 4 years

series_description: Affirmations filled out by an elector voted a ballot provisionally.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: Lists of names and addresses of persons who were sent confirmation or acknowledgement notices.
retention_statement: Paper: County Board will retain for five (5) years

series_description: Achnowledgement or confirmation cards retumed undeliverable
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for (4) years

series_description: Voter Verified Paper Audit Trail (VVPAT) official ballot to be used for recount purposes.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for eighty-one (81) days after an election or 22 months after a federal election ; Paper: Retain for eighty-one (81) days after an election or 22 months after a federal election

series_title: Proclamations of elections or legal advertisment of questions and issues
series_description: Proclamations of elections or legal advertisment of questions and issues
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year

series_description: Challenge froms pursuant to R.C. 3505.20
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years

series_description: Observer forms pursuant to R.C. 3505.21
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year

series_title: Census block reprecincting waiver form and accompanying maps
series_description: Census block reprecincting waiver form and accompanying maps
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four years (4)

series_title: Verification of handicapped accessible parking spaces and polling locations
series_description: Verification of handicapped accessible parking spaces and polling locations
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year

series_description: Certification of training hours completed
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years

series_description: Election Calendars
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Proofs of ballots
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 60 days after election

series_title: Report froms for local questions & issues including approved ballot language
series_description: Report froms for local questions & issues including approved ballot language
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 60 days after election

series_description: Certificates of results pursuant to R.C. 3505.32 and 3513.22
retention_statement: Paper: Retain six (6) years

series_title: Copies of state issues petitions or statewide candidate petitions
series_description: Copies of state issues petitions or statewide candidate petitions
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 60 days after election

series_description: Unofficial election results
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 60 days after election

series_description: Evidence or materials provided or used in conjunction with a protest hearing
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year

series_description: Yearly report to Secretary of State of the expenses of conducting elections
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four (4) years

series_title: Organization or Reorganization of Board of Elections
series_description: Report forms on organization or reorganization of board of elections
retention_statement: Paper: Retain six (6) years

series_description: Reimbursment records of costs of training poll workers
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years or until audited

series_title: Duplicate or incomplete voter registration forms
series_description: Duplicate or incomplete voter registration forms
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for four (4) years

series_description: Returned undeliverable 60 day notices
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until the elector appears to vote or until elector is removed from voter register.

series_title: Transmittal forms that accompany voter registration forms from agencies
series_description: Transmittal forms that accompany voter registration forms from agencies
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 (two) years

series_title: Copies of identification provided by electors
series_description: Copies of identification provided by electors with a voter registration form or absentee ballot application
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for the longer of these periods; 6 months from the date of receipt or 45 days from the date of the election for which the absentee ballot was issued

series_title: Copies of identification provided by electors with an absentee ballot and identification envelope.
series_description: Copies of identification provided by electors with an absentee ballot and identification envelope.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for Ninety (90) days from the date received

series_title: Copies of identification provided by the UOCAVA voter with a federal postcard application
series_description: Copies of identification provided by a(UOCAVA)voter with a federal postcard application. (UOCAVA)= Uniform and oversees citezen absentee voting act
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 (four) years from the date received

series_description: List of members of the central and executive committee, the count of political parties
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Copies of Confirmation cards sent by boards of elections
series_description: Copies of confirmation cards. Confirmation cards sent by boards of elections in accordance with SOS Directives.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Statement of receiving or providing compensation for circulating a statewide candidate petition
series_description: Statement of receiving or providing compensation for circulating a statewide candidate petition SOS Form 14
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year on site

series_title: Statement of Receiving or Providing compensation for circulating a statewide candidate petition
series_description: Statement of Receiving or Providing compensation for circulating a statewide candidate petition - SOS Form 15
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year on site

series_description: Per O.R.C. 147.01, 147.031, 147.05, 147.371, and 147.63. Applications for a new commission, commission renewal, duplicate commission, online authorization and amendment.
retention_statement: Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Retain six (6) years

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, Business Services Division operational records - which includes copies of work files, work rules, meeting minutes, systems documentation, problem resolutions, personal reports & special projects.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four (4) years

series_description: This record series consists of sign-in & sign-out sheets for the Business Services Division.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain three (3) years

series_description: This record series consists of undeliverable mail from the Business Services Division which includes, but is not limited to, agent registration notifications, approval certificates, biennial notifications, CCE notifications, name registrations, renewal notifications (trade names, fictitious name, trademark, service mark), RXM notifications (cancelled in error by tax department), tax cancellations.
retention_statement: Paper: Scan documents and check for completeness ; Electronic: Scanned images are retained for four (4) years.

series_description: This record series consists of training materials specific to Business Services Division staff. Including, but not limited to, training manuals.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Documents Served Upon the Secretary of State
series_description: This record series consists of documents served upon the Secretary of State. Including, but not limited to, initial pleadings, pre-clearances, bankruptcies, subpoenas, summons and complaints or other notice, process or demand and subsequent filings, notice of class action settlements under the Class Action Fairness Act, liquor license hearing notices.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years

series_description: Commissions for State Boards and Commissions members as appointed by the Governor. The commissions include information on the actual board or commission of the appointment, the beginning and ending terms of the appointment, and if the members have been reappointed or replaced. This record series also contains the oaths of office (notarized and signed) of the appointee.
retention_statement: Paper: Permanent retention

series_description: Executive Orders of the Governor
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four (4) years

series_description: Consists of a copy of the ordinance (approved by city commissioners) to annex property, map of the annexed property and the petition for annexation.
retention_statement: Paper: Permanent retention

series_description: Apostilles that are returned to our office by a customer if the document was improperly processed and contains a typographical or content error or apostilles returned to our office as the recipient’s address was undeliverable.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six (6) months

series_description: The official copy of a bill or joint resolution, passed by the House or Senate, including any amendments.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 2 years

series_description: (a) Corporate PACs & non-candidate committees yearly filings required by federal law. (b) Candidates & committees financial filings as required by federal law.
retention_statement: Electronic: Filings required by R.C. 3517.107 will be retained for six (6) years ; Paper: Filings required by R.C. 3517.107 will be retained on-site for six (6) years

series_description: Letters of instruction, information and guidance sent to all county board of elections concerning the election process and new election laws
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for 1 (one) year

series_description: Registration forms for nonresident aliens acquiring any interest either in his/her own name or in the name of another, in real property or mining rights located in the state of Ohio.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain six (6) months

series_description: Prepayment account deposit forms for the Corporations and UCC sections of the Business Services division.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Notebooks containing unofficial records of House and Senate bills, including bill number, bill description, date filed with the Secretary of State and effective date.
retention_statement: Paper: Three (3) years

series_description: Meeting minutes kept by county Board of Elections.
retention_statement: Paper: 1 (one) year

series_description: Official personnel file for Secretary of State employees. Including, but not limited to, letters of recommendation, medical records, disciplinary records, performance evaluations, acknowledgement forms, emergency contact sheets, position descriptions, weather essential employee forms, I-9 forms, FMLA forms and payroll deduction forms. Also includes copies of all documents required by DAS.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain seven (7) years after employee leaves employment. After ensuring that all required forms have been submitted to DAS per DAS instructions

series_description: Electronic file containing a log of public records requests received by the Secretary of State’s legal department. Log includes the date of the request, name of person or entity making the request, type of records requested, status of response, form of response & completion date.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Including, but not limited to, official meeting transcripts, copies of proposed constitutional amendments, correspondence with Ballot Board members & the Ohio Attorney General, and miscellaneous supporting documents from meetings of the Ohio Ballot Board.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain ten (10) years

series_description: List maintained by county boards of elections that contains contact information of qualified individuals available to serve as judges or precinct election officials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years

series_description: Form used by absent Uniformed Service members, their families, and citizens residing outside the United States. It may be used to register to vote, request an absentee ballot or update their contact information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four (4) years ; Electronic: Retain four (4) years

series_title: Election Administration and Voting Survey Biennial Reports
series_description: Election administration and voting survey biennial reports that include information on voter registrations, changes of name/address, absentee ballots, ballots cast provisionally and other election related information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years, three (3) months

series_description: A review to be conducted after each presidential primary and even-numbered general election to determine whether precinct election officials are satisfactorily performing their duties.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain fifteen (15) months

series_description: Local option petitions filed with county boards of elections.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four (4) years

series_title: Notice of County Board of Elections Public Meeting
series_description: Notice of public meeting of a county board of elections - including regular, special or emergency meetings. Required by R.C. 121.22 (F)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years, six (6) months

series_description: Copies of certificates of appointment to elected office. The certificate contains the name of the appointed official, the office held, and beginning and ending terms of the appointment.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four (4) years

series_title: County Job & Family Services Voter Registrations Report
series_description: Quarterly report of number of voter registration forms received from county job and family services offices.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year

series_description: Form given to elector at polling place indicating permission to cast a ballot.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain sixty (60) days after election

series_description: Annual reports submitted by county boards of elections that include information on the expense of conducting all elections during the year, type of voting equipment used and cost of maintaining voting equipment.
retention_statement: Electronic: Reports to be scanned and scans kept permanently. Hard copies may be destroyed after scanning. ; Paper: Reports to be scanned and scans kept permanently. Hard copies may be destroyed after scanning.

series_description: Pursuant to O.R.C. 3506.15, the office of the Ohio Secretary of State shall provide each county board of elections with the rules, instructions, directives and advisories that the Secretary of State finds necessary to ensure the proper conduct of elections.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronic version permanently. ; Paper: Retain hard copies for four (4) years

series_description: Including, but not limited to, appointment forms, recommendation letters and supporting materials for county board of elections members. (R.C. 3501.06 & R.C. 3501.07).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six (6) years

series_description: Forms reporting a county board of elections reorganization per R.C. 3501.09.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for four (4) years

series_title: Board of Elections Administration and Voting Survey Biennial Reports
series_description: Election administration and voting survey biennial reports received from county boards of elections per R.C. 3501.05 (L).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for three (3) years

series_description: Sign-in and sign-out sheets for certain Election division employees.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for three (3) years

series_description: Census block re-precincting waiver forms and accompanying maps received from county boards of elections. (R.C. 3501.18).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for ten (10) years

series_title: Board of Elections Job & Family Services Voter Registrations Report
series_description: Quarterly report from county boards of elections that provides the number of voter registration forms received from county job and family services offices.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years

series_description: Including, but not limited to, submitted vendor documents and records of meetings of the Board of Voting Machine Examiners.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for four (4) years ; Electronic: Retain for four (4) years

series_title: Central Ballot Tracking System Entry Copies
series_description: Soft copy of electronically submitted entries into the Central Ballot Tracking System (CBTS) – This includes information on absentee ballot applications and ballots processed for eligible voters under the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act and R.C. 3511.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for twenty-four (24) months

series_description: This record series consists of copies of absentee ballots submitted by county boards of elections to the Secretary of State’s office pursuant to R.C. 3509.01.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for eight (8) years

series_description: This record series consists of the following documents: General Ledger Records; General Requisitions; Inter-Departmental Purchase Order; Personal Service Contracts; Warrant Journals; Delivery Slips & Packing Lists; Direct Purchase Order; Purchase Order; Purchase Order Modifications; Purchase Order/Contract Encumbrance; Invoices; Requisitions for Supplies; Printing Orders; Out-of-State Travel Requests and the Travel Expense Report.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five (5) years

series_description: This record series consists of the following documents: Intra-State Transfer Vouchers and Intra-State Payment Vouchers.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five (5) years

series_description: This record series consists of the following documents: Equipment Inventory, Release for Abandoned Property, Vehicle to Salvage Information Sheet and Surplus Property Turn-in Documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five (5) years

series_title: Business Services Revenue Receipts, Deposits and Redistributions
series_description: This record series consists of the following documents: Revenue Receipts and Holding Account Redistribution and supporting documentation for all filings; Monthly Account Analysis Statements sent to TOS; Bad Check Letters; Monthly Reconciliations; Documentation for Refund Checks to Clients; Undeliverable Mail Containing Checks, Money Orders or State Warrants; Cash Receipts Records and other Correspondence Related to Revenue.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five (5) years

series_description: Form required to be completed under chapter 3504 of the Ohio Revised Code, submitted to county board of elections requesting a presidential ballot. Copy sent to the Secretary of State.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for twenty-two (22) months after the federal election

series_description: Forms required to be completed by board of elections staff verifying that they have reviewed and will comply with the Secretary of State’s ethics policy and Ohio ethics law. Original signed forms will be retained for board of elections permanent employees and copies of signed forms will be retained for board of elections precinct election workers, rovers and/or any temporary persons employed to assist with the election.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for four (4) years

series_title: Appointment of Director, Deputy Director or Chair of Board of Elections
series_description: Including, but not limited to, background check disclosure forms, appointment questionnaires and notice of appointment for county board of elections director, deputy director or chairperson.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for four (4) years

series_title: Election Equipment Purchased with Federal Funds
series_description: Forms required to be completed prior to selling, donating, transferring or disposing of election related equipment purchased with federal funds.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for four (4) years

series_description: Copy of log submitted by precinct election officials to county board of elections regarding incidents occurring at a precinct on Election Day.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Form to be completed by county board of elections verifying compliance with the Uniformed and Overseas Civilian Absentee Voting Act (UOCAVA).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years

series_title: Handicapped Accessible Equipment Purchased with HHS Funds
series_description: Forms required to be completed prior to transferring or disposing of handicapped accessible equipment purchased with Health and Human Services (HHS) funds.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years

series_description: Certificate and any supporting materials provided by a political party verifying their nominees for President and Vice-President of the United States.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six (6) years

series_description: A copy of the official charter or any amendment to the charter as submitted by a municipality’s clerk of council. (Section 9, Article XVIII, Ohio Constitution)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until replaced with amended version

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, the full text of a proposed rule, amendment to a current rule, or rule to be rescinded; the public notice required under R.C. 119.03(A); the rule summary; and the fiscal analysis of the rule required under R.C. 127.18.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in the Secretary of State office for six (6) months. After 6 months, transfer to storage for five (5) years. Then, may destroy. ; Electronic: Rules shall be maintained permanently until amended or rescinded.

series_description: Forms required to be completed by board of elections staff verifying that they have been trained on and will comply with the Secretary of State’s ethics policy and Ohio ethics law. Original signed forms will be provided to the Ohio Secretary of State’s Office for board of elections permanent employees. Original signed forms will be retained for board of elections precinct election workers, rovers and/or any temporary persons employed to assist with the election.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year

series_description: Copies of responses to the Division of Liquor Control regarding precinct boundaries or other local liquor option inquiries received from the Division of Liquor Control.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain six (6) months

series_description: Notices of acceptance, rejection, replacement or removal of precinct election officials. (R.C. 3501.22)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year

series_description: Form required to be completed under chapter 3504 of the Ohio Revised Code, submitted to county board of elections requesting a presidential ballot. Copy sent to the Secretary of State.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for twenty-two (22) months after the federal election

series_title: Authorization for Elector to Update Signature
series_description: Allows an elector to update his or her voter signature with the county board of elections per R.C. 3501.05(AA).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until signature updated or person no longer registered in county

series_description: Certification by the board of the most populous county in a district to overlap counties in that district, of the names of the candidates to appear on the primary or general election ballot for district offices. (R.C. 3505.01; R.C. 3513.05)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain six (6) months

series_description: Listing of election hardware (servers) providing make, model type, quantity, date of installation and software/firmware version.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Log submitted by precinct election officials to county board of elections regarding incidents occurring at a precinct on Election Day.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain sixty (60) days after an election or twenty-two (22) months after a federal election

series_title: Declaration of Intent to Change Political Party
series_description: Declaration of intent to change political party filed by an elected official prior to their submission of declaration of candidacy and petition for partisan office. R.C. 3513.191(C).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for ten (10) years

series_description: Statement of person challenged as to party affiliation when requesting an absentee voter’s ballot.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain sixty (60) days after an election or twenty-two (22) months after a federal election

series_description: Form completed by a precinct election official when a voter’s name does not appear in the poll book/list and the voter insists on voting in the wrong precinct of a multiple-precinct polling location.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for four (4) years

series_description: This record series contains copies of successful bids, contracts and related documents from vendors for various goods and/or services.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for eight (8) years

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, logic & accuracy testing, test decks, tapes, testing result records, zero tapes, close of polls tapes, cards downloaded, used seal/lock records, independent verification and validation testing (IV&V) of new voting equipment.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain sixty (60) days after an election or twenty-two (22) months after a federal election

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, Communication Workers of America (CWA) contracts, negotiation documents and miscellaneous supporting materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six (6) years

series_description: This series includes, but is not limited to, local elections official results; approved ballot language for any local question or issue transmitted by county boards of elections per R.C. 3501.11; report forms; resolutions/ordinances; and miscellaneous supporting documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copies for two (2) years on-site ; Electronic: Resolutions, ballot language and official results to be scanned and scans kept permanently.

series_title: Report Forms for Local Questions & Issues - DISCONTINUED SERIES
series_description: This is an obsolete series. Please refer to series E-07C (Authorization #050-0016)
retention_statement: Paper: N/A

series_title: Voter Registration & Absentee Ballot Application Copies and Related Correspondence
series_description: Copies of voter registration forms or absentee ballot applications and related correspondence received from county boards of elections or other states and kept for administrative purposes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Documents and correspondence submitted to the Secretary of State’s office by county board of elections pursuant to RC 3501.11(x), and resulting correspondence sent by the Secretary of State to the county boards.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copies and electronic version for four (4) years ; Electronic: Retain hard copies and electronic version for four (4) years

series_description: Includes internal correspondence (letters, memos, research); also, correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal interpretations and other miscellaneous inquires.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 (six) months ; Electronic: Retain 6 (six) months

series_description: Includes any correspondence (letters, memos, emails, research), documents (telephone messages, post-it notes, drafts and other limited documents) or other informal communication (voicemail, chats, social media posts, instant and text messages, and shared departmental calendars) which serve to convey information of temporary importance.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Notices of political party meetings and committee member lists.
retention_statement: Paper: Notices: retain two (2) years

series_title: Pollbooks, Poll Lists and Related Materials
series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, pollbooks, poll lists or signature pollbooks, tally sheets, summary statements, and other records and returns of an election delivered to the Board of Elections from polling places.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years

series_description: Written notices from registered voters of a change of address or name, including R.C. 3503.16(B)(1) notice of change of name (SOS prescribed Form 10-L).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four (4) years

series_title: Elector Application for Correction or Challenge Form
series_description: Forms to be completed pursuant to R.C. 3505.20, R.C. 3513.19 and R.C. 3513.20.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years

series_description: Payroll records of pollworkers, election extras, part-time workers and workers no longer employed at the boards.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four (4) years ; Electronic: Retain four (4) years

series_title: Chain of custody form and voting unit event log
series_description: This record series includes chain of custody forms and voting unit event log.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years

series_title: Affirmation of voter who does not possess any appropriate identification for voting purposes
series_description: Affirmation of voter who does not possess any appropriate identification for voting purposes - (SOS prescribed form #10-T).
retention_statement: Paper: For any Form 10-T completed prior to the May 6, 2014 primary election, retain two (2) years

series_title: Certifications by most populous county of overlapping local questions and issues
series_description: Certifications by most populous county of overlapping local questions and issues.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 60 days after election

series_description: Notices sent to electors that are returned as undeliverable (i.e. change of precinct, polling location or voting district, notice of cancellation of voter registration following receipt of notification of the death of a registered elector).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four (4) years

series_description: An elector may designate another individual as an Attorney-in-Fact to complete election related documents. (R.C. 3501.11; R.C. 3501.382)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until revoked or elector no longer registered in county.

series_description: Letters sent by Board of Elections requesting a registered voter to provide their date of birth.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: State and Territorial Exchange of Vital Events (STEVE) files
series_description: File containing county statewide voter registration database (SWVRD) records that have been matched with records of decedents for the purpose of cancelling the registrations of deceased voters.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain two (2) years

series_title: Cancellation of Registration of Deceased Elector
series_description: Includes Notice of Death of Registered Voter (R.C. 3503.21(A)(3)) and Notice of Cancellation of Voter Registration (R.C. 3503.21(F)) following receipt of notification of death of a registered elector. (SOS prescribed forms 255-C and 255-D)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years

series_description: This record series includes candidate petitions and other forms submitted by candidates, receipts, candidate lists, report forms, log sheets, and other administrative paperwork associated with processing candidate petitions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six (6) years ; Electronic: Retain for six (6) years

series_description: Initial and supplemental petitions and related documentation concerning proposed constitutional amendments, proposed statutes, and statewide referenda.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six (6) years ; Electronic: Retain for six (6) years

series_description: Correspondence with board of elections pertaining to election related matters including board litigation issues.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six (6) months ; Electronic: Retain for six (6) months

series_description: Responses received from county boards of elections due to a request from the Secretary of State via directive, advisory, memorandum, survey, or other written request for information (e.g., estimated election day turnout, contact information for election night, and extended board hours).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Administrative plans created by county boards of elections indicating preparations for conducting elections and handling of possible emergency situations on election day.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years

series_description: A copy of an audit workbook verifying that a county board of elections has conducted an audit of the election process. Required after each even-numbered year general election and after presidential primary elections verifying the accuracy of the election process.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years

series_description: Includes certificates of election issued to persons declared elected, forms to report certifications of persons elected or appointed to elective office; appointments to fill vacancies in nomination on the ballot; governor’s commissions per R.C. 107.05 and 107.06. Also includes forms to report political affiliation of previous office holder certified by the board of elections director.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six (6) years

series_description: Includes required verification of handicapped accessible parking and polling locations submitted by county boards pursuant to R.C. 3501.29 as well as documentation related to polling location accessibility spot checks conducted by the Secretary of State’s office.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain required verification for two (2) years ; Electronic: Retain required verification for two (2) years

series_title: National Change of Address List from Vendor
series_description: Lists of names and addresses provided to the Secretary of State’s office by vendor pursuant to National Change of Address process that are used in determining an individual’s voter registration status.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years ; Electronic: Retain two (2) years

series_title: State and Territorial Exchange of Vital Events (STEVE) Files
series_description: File containing county statewide voter registration database (SWVRD) records that have been matched with records of decedents for the purpose of cancelling the registrations of deceased voters.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retains two (2) years

series_description: Files containing county statewide voter registration database (SWVRD) records that have been matched with recently updated BMV records.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain two (2) years

series_title: Administrative complaint alleging a violation of Title III of the Help America Vote Act (HAVA)
series_description: Documents and correspondence related to an administrative complaint filed by an individual alleging a violation of Title III of the Help America Vote Act of 2002 under Ohio’s administrative complaint procedures.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years following final resolution of complaint ; Electronic: Retain two (2) years following final resolution of complaint

series_title: Board of Elections Under Review by the Secretary of State’s Office
series_description: Documentation and correspondence related to county boards of elections undergoing review by the Secretary of State’s office.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years following notification to board of elections that it is no longer subject to review ; Electronic: Retain two (2) years following notification to board of elections that it is no longer subject to review

series_description: Application for absentee ballots and registration as a voter on a form adopted in accordance with federal regulations relating to the Uniformed and Overseas Citizen Absentee Voting Act per R.C. 3511.02.
retention_statement: Paper: Applications to be scanned ; Electronic: Applications to be scanned

series_description: Party formation petitions filed to create a political party under R.C. 3517.01.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four (4) years

series_title: Federal Census Research and Reference Documentation
series_description: Census data and reports obtained from the United States Census Bureau used by county boards of elections in reconfiguring precinct boundaries and by the Secretary of State in issuing proclamations under R.C. 703.06, and related correspondence, including the proclamations issued by the Secretary of State.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until receipt of the census data and reports for the next succeeding federal census ; Electronic: A copy of the Excel spreadsheet containing the census data to be transferred to State Archives. After transfer, retain until receipt of the census data and reports for the next succeeding federal census

series_description: Includes letters and other routine correspondence generated and/or sent by the Elections Division and returned by the postal service as undeliverable.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain six (6) months

series_description: Records of day to day activity. Includes telephone messages, post-it-notes, drafts and other limited documents which serve to convey information of temporary importance on a day to day basis.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: The Secretary of State’s daily business calendar including official business schedules or itineraries.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, the minister license application, ordination credentials, cancellation evidence from religious society or congregation, and supporting materials.
retention_statement: Electronic: Electronic records to be retained for seventy-five (75) years. ; Paper: Paper records to be retained for seventy-five (75) years or, if scanned and checked for completeness, can be destroyed. Supporting materials will be retained until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Contracts, Memorandums of Understanding (MOU) and Related Materials
series_description: This series contains memorandums of understanding (MOU), contracts, contract encumbrances, procurements, complaints to vendors, related MOU and contract documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five (5) years after MOU or contract expires ; Electronic: Retain five (5) years after MOU or contract expires

series_description: Documents pertaining to public records requests, including but not limited to the original request, correspondence between staff and requestor or other staff, redacted and unredacted responsive records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain three (3) years ; Electronic: Retain three (3) years

series_description: Includes campaign finance reports, designations of treasurer, terminations, receipts and expenditures, and other paperwork that campaign finance committees are required by state law to file with the Ohio Secretary of State’s office.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for six (6) years ; Electronic: Retain in office for six (6) years

series_description: Includes letters and checklists concerning examinations conducted by the Secretary of State’s Campaign Finance audit staff of campaign finance committee filings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for six (6) years ; Electronic: Retain in office for six (6) years

series_description: Referral documentation submitted by the Secretary of State’s Office to the Ohio Elections Commission and related correspondence.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for two (2) years after disposition of referral ; Electronic: Retain in office for two (2) years after disposition of referral

series_description: Correspondence concerning requests submitted by campaign finance committees for an exemption from the disclaimer requirements set forth in state law.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for two (2) years ; Electronic: Retain in office for two (2) years

series_description: Includes administrative rules, rule summary fiscal analysis, and other materials concerning the Secretary of State’s Office’s rules filed with the Joint Committee on Agency Rule Review (JCARR).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five (5) years. State to review records prior to disposition ; Electronic: Retain five (5) years. State Archives to review records prior to disposition

series_description: Analysis of proposed legislation and its impact on the Secretary of State’s office and the county boards of elections. Can include, but is not limited to, copies of current and pending state or federal legislation or draft legislation, analysis of issues and impact, correspondence, research materials, memoranda, or opinions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of use ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of use

series_description: This is an obsolete series that has been replaced by series CF-01: Campaign Finance Commitee Filings (50030124)
retention_statement: Paper: Microfilm, retain hard copy 4 years

series_description: This is an obsolete series that has been replaced by series CF-01: Campaign Finance Commitee Filings (50030124)
retention_statement: Paper: Microfilm, retain hard copy 4 years

series_description: Administrative plans created by county boards of elections indicating preparations for conducting elections and handling of possible emergency situations on election day.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for four (4) years ; Electronic: Retain for four (4) years

series_description: The original audit workbook verifying that the county board of elections has conducted an audit of the election process. To be completed after each even-numbered year general election and after presidential primary elections verifying the accuracy of the election process.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for four (4) years

series_description: Statement of absentee voter and absent voter’s ballot identification envelope supplement.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain ninety (90) days after an election, or twenty-two (22) months after a federal election

series_title: Mailing Envelope Containing Voted Absent Voter Ballot
series_description: Mailing envelope containing a voted absent voter ballot.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain ninety (90) days after an election

series_description: This series includes, but is not limited to, reapportionment and redistricting maps, reapportionment and redistricting information, census materials and supporting documentation received following each decennial apportionment and redistricting.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain twenty (20) years. State to review records prior to disposition ; Electronic: Retain twenty (20) years. State Archives to review records prior to disposition

series_description: This record series includes the oaths of office, surety bonds and supporting materials for certain state officials, including the Governor, Lieutenant Governor, Treasurer of State, Auditor of State, Deputy Auditor of State, Attorney General, First Assistant Attorney General, and other employees as designated by the Attorney General.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for eight (8) years. State to review records prior to dispostion

series_title: Documentation of Campaign Finance Filings Examinations
series_description: Includes letters and audit checklists concerning examinations of campaign finance filings filed with the board of elections.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for six (6) years ; Electronic: Retain in office for six (6) years

series_description: This record series contains classification specifications developed for all positions, offices, and employments in the service of the state and approved by the Department of Administrative Services. Specifications are required to be filed with the Ohio Secretary of State’s Office under Revised Code 124.14.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for four (4) years ; Paper: Retain for four (4) years

series_description: Confirmation notices sent by the county boards to voters in order to verify registration records; and returned confirmation notices with updated or confirmed information. Boards maintain a list of these responses.
retention_statement: Paper: County Board will retain for five (5) years

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, data quality reports and duplicate reports generated by the statewide voter registration database and sent to boards of elections to correct or add to a voter’s record.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 60 days or until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain for 60 days or until no longer of administrative value

series_description: The complete and official registration list for each precinct of all qualified registered voters in the precinct that must be prepared fourteen (14) days before an election. Per R.C. 3503.23, this list (in paper or electronic form) is to be made available at the board of elections for viewing by the public during normal business hours.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years

series_description: Printed, blank signature pollbooks that have been prepared as backup in case of problems with the electronic pollbook, but then not used during the election.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 60 days or until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Copy of form to be completed by county board of elections verifying compliance with the Uniformed and Overseas Civilian Absentee Voting Act (UOCAVA) and submitted to the Ohio Secretary of State’s office.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, the Application, Information Update and Cancellation Request forms submitted by participants to the Ohio Safe At Home Address Confidentiality Program.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year following certification expiration or cancellation ; Electronic: Retain one (1) year following certification expiration or cancellation

series_title: Safe At Home Application Assistant Forms
series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, the Application and Cancellation Request forms submitted by application assistants to the Ohio Safe At Home Address Confidentiality Program.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year following cancellation ; Electronic: Retain one (1) year following cancellation

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, Election Notices sent to Safe At Home participants that have been returned as undeliverable and any related materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for four (4) years ; Electronic: Retain for four (4) years

series_title: Safe At Home Legal Process Documents
series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, subpoenas to produce documents, court orders, and law enforcement requests.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed

series_description: This records series includes, but is not limited to, documents, spreadsheets, and other sources regarding statistics for the Safe at Home program.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for five (5) years ; Electronic: Retain for five (5) years

series_description: This records series includes, but is not limited to, training materials given and/or presented to prospective Application Assistants and law enforcement officers.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: This records series includes, but is not limited to, newsletters sent to Safe at Home participants and Application Assistants.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years

series_title: Safe At Home Form Development Records
series_description: This records series includes, but is not limited to, drafts of forms and correspondence related to the drafting of forms.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one (1) month after form is discontinued, superceded, or cancelled ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) month after form is discontinued, superceded, or cancelled

series_title: Safe At Home Confidential Voter Registration Request
series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, the Request to Have a Confidential Voter Registration Record and any related materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain permanently. ; Electronic: Retain permanently.

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, Acknowledgement Notices sent to Safe At Home participants that have been returned undeliverable and any related materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for four (4) years ; Electronic: Retain for four (4) years

series_title: Safe At Home Confidential Voter Registration Cancellation
series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, the Request to Cease Having a Confidential Voter Registration Record and any related materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain permanently. ; Electronic: Retain permanently.

series_title: Safe At Home Absentee Identification Envelope Supplement
series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, the Absent Voter’s Ballot Identification Envelope Supplement and any related materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain ninety (90) days after an election, or twenty-two (22) months after a federal election ; Electronic: Retain ninety (90) days after an election, or twenty-two (22) months after a federal election

series_title: Elected Official and Appointment Certification Forms
series_description: Forms to report certifications of persons elected to office; report of certifications of persons appointed to elective office; report appointments to fill vacancies in nomination on the ballot; and/or report political affiliation of previous office holder certified by the board of elections director.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain six (6) years

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, audit and transaction records and images of signatures captured that are produced by electronic pollbooks.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain six (6) years

series_title: Statewide Voter Registration Database Vendor Documents
series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, documents of vendor compliance, test plans, compliance certifications, and enhancement documentation for the Statewide Voter Registration Database.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for twenty (20) years

series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, a warrant for arrest or requisition for the return of the person charged and any supporting documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two (2) years

series_description: Accepted and rejected petitions for elections; declarations of intent to be write-in candidates.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six (6) years;

series_title: Federal Write-in Absentee Ballot (FWAB) Election Notice
series_description: A notice required to be prepared prior to an election that provides the list of offices and questions and issues that will appear on the ballot and which includes specific instructions for uniformed services and overseas voters on casting the FWAB. (R.C. 3511.16)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one (1) year ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) year

series_description: Records produced by the recounting of ballots and re-examination of the reconciliation of records of the official results of an election. (R.C. 3515)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six (6) years ; Electronic: Retain for six (6) years

series_description: A notice or letter returned by a voter in response to a notification regarding possible cancellation of the voter’s registration.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for five (5) years

series_description: Records of grants received for election related equipment.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until state and federal audits have been conducted, audit reports released, and audit resolutions issued or resolved ; Electronic: Retain until state and federal audits have been conducted, audit reports released, and audit resolutions issued or resolved

series_description: This series includes, but is not limited to, training manuals, quick reference guides and related materials that are used to train precinct election officials prior to an election.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one (1) year or until replaced by updated training materials, whichever occurs first ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) year or until replaced by updated training materials, whichever occurs first

series_description: Includes data of participants who completed the online pollworker training course.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for one (1) year

series_description: Includes transition fund campaign finance reports, designations of treasurer, terminations, receipts and expenditures, and other paperwork that campaign finance transition funds are required by state law to file with the office of the Ohio Secretary of State. (RC 3517.1014)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for ten (10) years ; Electronic: Retain for ten (10) years

series_description: This record series covers any documents created or used for Election night reporting. This includes, but is not limited to, test scripts, test reports, mock election instructions, mock election proofing material or candidate proofing material.
retention_statement: Paper: Two (2) years. ; Electronic: Two (2) years.

series_description: Includes board meeting agendas, schedules, and meeting minutes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two (2) years ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years

series_title: Notary Complaints, Investigations, Disciplinary Determinations and Administrative Hearing Case Files
series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, complaints received against notaries public, communication with investigators, reports filed by investigators, disciplinary determinations, documents created and received during the administrative hearing process in compliance with Chapter 119 of the Revised Code. Files may include notices of opportunity for hearing, hearing requests, hearing scheduling letters, hearing examiner reports of recommendation, final orders and other correspondence and supporting documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for seventy-five (75) years ; Electronic: Retain for seventy-five (75) years

series_description: Includes training manuals, guides, registration correspondence and any related materials created and used during webinars to train County Boards of Elections staff in a variety of elections matters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one (1) year or until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) year or until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Includes cards received from individuals who wish to serve as a poll worker and any related materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until information has been transferred to online database ; Electronic: Retain until information has been transferred to online database

series_description: This record series includes reports done after a primary election that reflect political party affiliation changes and any support materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for three (3) years ; Electronic: Retain for three (3) years

series_title: Notices to Voter Registration Records Pending Cancellation
series_description: This record series includes notices sent to addresses of voter registration records that are subject to cancellation under federal and state law.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for five (5) years ; Electronic: Retain for five (5) years

series_description: Documents compiled to make a determination as to whether an investigation is warranted and any subsequent documents gathered during an investigation or created in the course of an investigation. Can include, but is not limited to, complaints, information on individuals involved, narratives detailing specifics of the matter, supporting documentation (interviews, background checks, reports, etc.), and an explanation of the final determination to close the investigation or proceed to referral. Investigations that culminate in referral may also include, but not be limited to, the complaint, legal documents, investigative materials, internal memos, correspondence, attorney notes, research, attorney work product, and transcripts.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for seven (7) years after case is closed. ; Electronic: Retain for seven (7) years after case is closed.

series_description: A political party's constitution and bylaws as required to be filed with the Secretary of State under Ohio Revised Code 3517.02.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: This series contains records relating to meetings of the Ohio Electoral College. It includes, but is not limited to, cast electoral ballots for President and Vice President, certificates of ascertainment, certificates of votes, certificates of appointment, planning documents, programs, transcripts, presidential elector lists, and correspondence with electors, political parties, the US Senate and National Archives.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for four (4) years ; Electronic: Retain for four (4) years

series_description: Electronic files received by the Secretary of State’s office from other states or territories for the purpose of comparison and cross-checking of voter registration records.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for sixty (60) days or until no longer of investigative value.
